global_attributes.description:
PFT input data created on 2025/06/09/21:03:25
 use READ(tline,*)DY,PPI(NZ,NY,NX),SDPTHI(NZ,NY,NX) to read planting information from pft_pltinfo; use READ(tline,*)DY,ICUT,JCUT,HCUT,PCUT,ECUT11,ECUT12,ECUT13,ECUT14,ECUT21,ECUT22,ECUT23,ECUT24 to read management information from pft_mgmt

attributes.long_name: Starting column from the west for a topo unit
Ending column at the east for a topo unit
Starting row from the north  for a topo unit
Ending row at the south  for a topo unit
Number of pfts on a topo unit
Number of managements for a given pft in in given topo unit in a year

attributes.flags: -1 no pft data, 0 only plantation information, 1 transient pft data
